claim_boundary: operator semantics define AttackPlan applicability and routing, not cryptographic break evidence

formal_rules.statement: The AttackPlan operator is only applicable when every required parameter declared by the operator schema is present.
The operator may only be routed through families listed in its AttackPlan family binding.
Unreviewed operator semantics may support applicability and routing checks, but cannot authorize a cryptographic security claim.
